name: Transcribe audio or video
description: Transcribe speech from an audio or video file owned by the current user. Uses attached media by default and can save the transcript as a downloadable text artifact.

fileId.description: Optional id of an audio or video file owned by the user. Defaults to attached media.

language.description: Optional ISO language hint such as es or en.

prompt.description: Optional vocabulary or context hint for transcription.

saveTranscript.description: Save the transcript as a downloadable TXT artifact. Default false.
